overall.description: Cinematic game engine footage of a grand medieval dining hall reminiscent of a magic school, featuring floating candles, long dining tables filled with students, a large stone fireplace, and towering stained glass windows. The atmosphere is warm and atmospheric with mixed lighting from fire and moonlight.

scene_state.functional_zone: grand dining hall with floating candles and house tables

agents.ego_description: stationary observation of the grand hall from an elevated position at the rear, overlooking the dining area

entered.detail: hundreds of floating candles suspended in mid-air providing magical illumination throughout the hall
tall gothic stained glass windows emitting blue moonlight into the hall
large stone fireplace with active fire burning on the left wall
long wooden house tables lined with students and food running the length of the hall
polished stone floor reflecting the candlelight and fire glow

segments.scene_description: A static cinematic view of a grand gothic dining hall filled with students seated at long house tables. Floating candles illuminate the space from above while a large fireplace burns on the left wall and moonlight filters through towering stained glass windows on the right. The camera remains stationary, capturing the ambient atmosphere and dense crowd of dining students.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot presents a static, atmospheric view of a grand gothic dining hall where warm firelight and cool moonlight converge. It begins by capturing the vast scale of the room, focusing on the dense crowd of students seated at long house tables. As the eye wanders through the space, the glow of floating candles illuminates the ceiling while a large fireplace burns steadily along the left wall. The scene then balances this warmth against the right side of the hall, where pale moonlight filters through towering stained glass windows to complete the ambient mood.
